mapper.select: select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name from employee e where e.com_id = #{comId} and (e.emp_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or e.emp_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select pm.pm_id, p.pro_name, e.emp_name, pm.role,pm.joined_at from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id=e.emp_id join project p on p.pro_id=pm.project_pro_id where p.pro_id = #{value};
select pm.*, e.emp_name from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id = e.emp_id where pm.pm_id = #{pmId}
select pm.pm_id, e.emp_name from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id = e.emp_id where pm.project_pro_id = #{ProId}
